_meta.notes: Alchemy trainer. Found in the herb-glade region (drowned-orchard adjacent). Knows what every leaf tastes like and what each one will do to a person.

tagline: small, wiry, hands stained green-brown to the wrists.

behavior.default: tends a row of clay jars, each labeled in handwriting only she can read
narrativeHooks: Vael's tea always tastes faintly of something that isn't tea.
She names every plant by the kind of dream it gives.

teachingLines: Bitter does not mean bad. Sweet does not mean safe.
If you don't know what it does, don't drink it. That's the first law.
